## Summary

Describe the focused behavior or documentation change.

## Contract impact

- [ ] No numerical, public Rust API, C ABI v1, Python layout, or golden-hash change
- [ ] Contract change proposed and documented below

Contract details:

## Verification

- [ ] Focused tests
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Golden hashes/parity checked when numerical behavior could change
- [ ] Python/FFI checks run when those interfaces changed

Commands and results:

## Provenance and release hygiene

- [ ] No ISO publications, generated `data/`, credentials, local archives, or machine-specific paths are included
- [ ] User-visible changes are recorded in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Generated headers were regenerated rather than hand-edited

## Limitations

List checks that could not be run and why.
